name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description: A world set in the modern era, where monsters know as cursed spirits are born through cursed energy, these monsters are defeated by sorcerers, special humans who are born with the ability to control cursed energy. You are a japanese sorcerer, you'll have to defeat cursed spirits and mantain the order in the world, sometimes, you might even have to fight curse users, evil sorcerers that use their powers for their own gain and evil actions... Will you survive this harsh world, who will you meet, how many of these people will you have to watch die? Do you have what it takes to become the strongest sorcerer of the modern era? Live an adventure on this rpg, narrated, text adventure.
creator: ThoserIsCrazy
